expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜的板材尺寸。[宽度]、[高度]、[深度]为整体尺寸，[板材厚度]为顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[背景板厚度]为背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Lebar], [Tinggi],[Kedalaman] ialah Pengukuran keseluruhan, [KetebalanPapan] ialah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [KetebalanBelakang] ialah ketebalan bahan Latar Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Lebar], [Tinggi],[Kedalaman] adalah Ukuran total, [TebalPapan] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [TebalBelakang] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Latar Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นกระดานสำหรับตู้ [กว้าง], [สูง], [ลึก] เป็นการวัดรวม, [ความหนาแผ่นกระดาน] คือ ความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นกระดานบน, ล่าง และด้านข้าง, [ความหนากระดานหลัง] คือ ความหนาของวัสดุกระดานหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước tấm ván cho tủ. [Rộng], [Cao],[Sâu] là Kích thước tổng thể, [ĐộDầyVán] là độ dày vật liệu của Ván Trên, Dưới và Bên, [ĐộDàyTấmLưng] là độ dày vật liệu của Tấm Lưng. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng tabla para sa isang gabinete. Ang [Lapad], [Taas],[Lalim] ay kabuuang Sukat, ang [KapalNgTabla] ay kapal ng materyal para sa Itaas, Ilalim, at Gilid na Tabla, at ang [KapalNgLikuran] ay kapal ng materyal para sa Latar Likuran. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: လျှာအဘို့ဂျိုင်းများရဲ့အရွယ်အစားကိုတွက်ချက်သည်။ [အနံ], [အမြင့်],[နက်နက်] သည် စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာမှုဖြစ်ပြီး [板材厚度] သည်ထိပ်, အောက်ခြေ နှင့်ဘေးဖြစ်ပြီး [အနောက်ဘား厚度] သည်ဘေးကျောပန္းတိုင်ဖြစ်သည်။(AI translated, pls check)
remarks.km: គណនាតម្លៃប័ទ្ទ័​សម្រាប់ទូ ឧបករណ៍ដើម្បីបំពេញគណនាដោយសារតែ[ទទឹង], [កម្ពស់],[សម្ព័ន្ធនិងអំពីរាងអ្វីផ្សេងទៀត] គឺទំហំសរុប។(AI translation,:)Psdpl certify syntax checking request ngum, pls.subtitlerefix
